# USBIdlePolicyTypePipe

**Enumeration Case**

An idle policy that applies to the pipe that communicates with the device.

## Declaration

```swift
USBIdlePolicyTypePipe
```

## Getting the Idle Policy

- **USBIdlePolicyTypeInterface**: An idle policy that applies to the interface connected to the device.
